name: Printful
description: Print-on-demand fulfillment service that lets you create custom products, manage orders, and generate product mockups. Handles printing, warehousing, and shipping so you can sell custom merchandise without inventory.

capabilities.name: list_catalog_products
capabilities.description: Browse the Printful product catalog to find available products like t-shirts, mugs, posters, and other printable items.

capabilities.name: get_product_details
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific product including available variants, sizes, colors, and pricing.

capabilities.name: create_order
capabilities.description: Submit a new print-on-demand order with recipient details, product variants, and print file URLs for fulfillment.

capabilities.name: estimate_order_cost
capabilities.description: Calculate estimated costs for an order including product, printing, and shipping costs before actually placing it.

capabilities.name: get_shipping_rates
capabilities.description: Calculate available shipping rates and delivery estimates for a given set of items and destination address.

capabilities.name: manage_sync_products
capabilities.description: List and manage synchronized products in your Printful store, including creating, updating, and deleting product listings.

capabilities.name: generate_mockup
capabilities.description: Create realistic product mockup images by combining your design files with product templates for use in storefronts.

capabilities.name: get_order_status
capabilities.description: Retrieve the current status and details of an existing order including fulfillment progress, tracking info, and shipment details.
